nanshi:
id,amis,chinese,image,sound,color
TITLE,南勢阿美語 看圖說故事 1-1～1-2,,,,
SENTENCES,O maan konini?|Sapaluma' ko ngiha' nonini?|Mamaan a somowal?,,,,
DICE,Ira ko...|O ... kako.|Maolah...,,,,
a,"Aluman ku cavay nu maku,",我有很多朋友，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#bae6fd
b,"ira ku vavainayan,",有男生，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#ffe8b3
c,ira ku vavahiyan.,也有女生。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#fb8c00
d,"Saremiad sa kami a maruyaruy a micudad,",我們天天一起讀書，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#e63946
e,a mihulul.,也一起玩耍。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#f48fb1
f,"Kapah ku pasevanaay nu niyam,",我們的老師很好，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#66bb6a
g,hinasuwal tu nu Pangcah a masasuwal kami.,她常常和我們一起說族語，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#ba68c8
h,Manay maulah kami i ciraanan.,我們都非常喜歡她。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_1.mp3,#fdd835
,,,,,
i,"U micudaday kaku,",我是學生，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#4db6ac
j,i ngata nu cacudadan ku luma' nu maku.,我的家在我的學校附近。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#ff8a65
k,"Rakaten nu maku a talacacudadan tu remiremiad,",我天天走路去學校，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#bae6fd
l,rakaten tu a taluma'.,也走路回家。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#ffe8b3
m,"Dadahal ku cacudadan nu niyam,",我們的學校很大，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#fb8c00
n,"aluman aca ku micudaday, atu pasevana'ay.",有很多學生，也有很多老師。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#e63946
o,"Kapah ku pasevana'ay nu niyam,",我們的老師都很好，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#f48fb1
p,"saremiad sa a pacavay i tamiyanan a micudad, a remadiw.",他們天天和我們一起讀書，也一起唱歌。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#66bb6a
q,"Hinasuwal kami tu nu Pangcah,",我們常常說族語。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#ba68c8
r,ururam ku ulah nu maku tu cacudadan nu niyam.,我非常喜歡我的學校。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/nanshi/story_1_2.mp3,#fdd835

malan:
id,amis,chinese,image,sound,color
TITLE,馬蘭阿美語 看圖說故事 1-1～1-2,,,,
SENTENCES,O maan konini?|Sapaluma' ko ngiha' nonini?|Mamaan a somowal?,,,,
DICE,Ira ko...|O ... kako.|Maolah...,,,,
a,Alomanay ko widang ako.,我有很多朋友，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#bae6fd
b,"Ila ko fa'inayan,",有男生，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#ffe8b3
c,ila ko fafahiyan.,也有女生。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#fb8c00
d,"Malacafay kami a mitilid to romiamiad,",我們天天一起讀書，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#e63946
e,malacafay kami a misalama.,也一起玩耍。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#f48fb1
f,O singsi niyam nga'ayay.,我們的老師很好，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#66bb6a
g,"Malalid ko mira ato tamiyanan a caciyaw to sowal no Amis,",她常常和我們一起說族語，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#ba68c8
h,malacafay haca a lomadiw.,也一起唱歌。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#fdd835
i,Tadamaolah kami to singsian niyam.,我們都非常喜歡她。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780782883/%E6%88%91%E5%80%91%E9%80%99%E4%B8%80%E7%8F%AD_lef8rs.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_1.mp3,#4db6ac
,,,,,
j,O mitiliday kako.,我是學生，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#ff8a65
k,Mangataay ko loma' niyam to kongkoan ako.,我的家在我的學校附近。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#bae6fd
l,"Romakat kako talakongkoan to romiamiad,",我天天走路去學校，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#ffe8b3
m,romakat a minokay.,也走路回家。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#fb8c00
n,"Taangayay ko kongkoan niyam,",我們的學校很大，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#e63946
o,"alomanay ko mitiliday, alomanay ko singsi.",有很多學生，也有很多老師。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#f48fb1
p,Nga'ayay maemin ko singsi niyam.,我們的老師都很好，,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#66bb6a
q,"Malalid pacafay tamiyanan a mitilid, pacafay haca a lomadiw.",他們天天和我們一起讀書，也一起唱歌。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#ba68c8
r,Malaliday kami a somowal to sowal no Amis.,我們常常說族語。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#fdd835
s,Tadamaolah kako to kongkoan ako.,我非常喜歡我的學校。,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/image/upload/v1780783040/%E6%88%91%E7%9A%84%E5%AD%B8%E6%A0%A1_lhafmv.jpg,https://res.cloudinary.com/dm1ksvptk/video/upload/amis/picture_talk/malan/story_1_2.mp3,#4db6ac
